description: European Union Artificial Intelligence Act - Requirements for High-Risk AI Systems

controls.name: Risk Management System
controls.description: High-risk AI systems shall have a risk management system established, implemented, documented and maintained.

controls.name: Data Governance
controls.description: Training, validation, and testing data sets shall be subject to appropriate data governance and management practices.

controls.name: Technical Documentation
controls.description: Technical documentation shall be drawn up before the AI system is placed on the market or put into service.

controls.name: Record Keeping
controls.description: High-risk AI systems shall technically allow for automatic recording of events (logs) over the lifetime of the system.

controls.name: Transparency
controls.description: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way as to ensure sufficient transparency to enable users to interpret and use the system output appropriately.

controls.name: Human Oversight
controls.description: High-risk AI systems shall be designed and developed in such a way as to be effectively overseen by natural persons during the period of use.

controls.name: Accuracy and Robustness
controls.description: High-risk AI systems shall be designed to achieve appropriate levels of accuracy, robustness and cybersecurity.

controls.name: Cybersecurity
controls.description: High-risk AI systems shall be resilient against attempts by malicious third parties to alter their use or performance.

controls.name: Quality Management
controls.description: Providers shall put a quality management system in place that ensures compliance with this Regulation.

controls.name: Transparency for GPAI
controls.description: General-purpose AI model providers shall draw up and keep up-to-date technical documentation and make it available.

controls.name: Fundamental Rights Impact
controls.description: Before deploying a high-risk AI system, deployers shall perform an assessment of the impact on fundamental rights.

controls.name: Systemic Risk Evaluation
controls.description: GPAI models with systemic risk shall perform model evaluation, adversarial testing, and incident tracking.
